## Project Overview
Movie Search Advanced is a React-based web application that allows users to:
- Search for movies using the OMDB API
- Filter movies by year
- View trending movies
- Save favorite movies
- Built with Vite for fast development and optimized production builds

## Quick Start
1. Open your browser to http://localhost:5173/
2. Use the search bar to find movies
3. Click the star icon to add movies to favorites
4. View your favorites in the Favorites tab
